## Description

**Portfolio** puts the work first. The home page is an edge-to-edge masonry grid that morphs into a single column on mobile. Each card lets the cover image breathe — no decorative chrome competing for attention. Hover surfaces a category filter and a "view project" affordance.

The single-project template ditches the sidebar and pushes the cover image full width, with the body and meta rendered in a centered reading column below. Pink accents on links + CTAs keep brand identity tight without overwhelming the content.

Best fit: designers, photographers, illustrators, agencies, anyone whose work needs to speak first.
